title: Jul 08: Mideast Strikes Shake Oil Markets, Chip Stocks Retreat on Samsung Earnings, and the $14,000 Doorless EV
description: US Strikes in Iran Trigger Oil Price Surge and Revoked Energy Waivers • Samsung Earnings Spark Broader Sell-Off in Chip Sector • SpaceX Slips on Nasdaq-100 Debut Amid Tesla Merger Speculation • Amazon Launches Giant $25 Billion Bond Sale to Fund AI Infrastructure • Major U.S. Banks Explore Deal to Shake Up Payment Card Networks • Vertex Pharmaceuticals to Acquire Crinetics for $10 Billion • Rivian Shares Crash 18% Following Large Capital Raise • White House Targets Grocers on Meat Prices as Walmart Cuts Food Costs • Anthropic Inks Massive $19 Billion Infrastructure Lease With TeraWulf • Stellantis Imports Tiny, Doorless $14,000 Fiat Topolino EV to the U.S. • Why Smucker's $5 Billion Bet on Hostess Twinkies Flopped
